features: Indulgent Sweet Scent - Enjoy the warm, comforting aroma of baked cinnamon buns that turns your daily shower into a cozy, spa-like treat
Gentle & Moisturizing Formula - Enriched with skin-loving ingredients that leave your skin soft, hydrated, and refreshed after every wash
Versatile Bath & Shower Use - Perfect for both a luxurious bubble bath or an energizing shower experience, suitable for all skin types
Complete Pampering Set - Comes with a soft white washcloth for gentle exfoliation and a truly relaxing cleansing ritual.
Vegan & Cruelty-Free - Treaclemoon products are proudly vegan-friendly and never tested on animals, combining care for you and the planet
description: Product description Transform your bath routine into a moment of comfort and indulgence with the Treaclemoon Baked Cinnamon Bun Shower & Bath Gel. This 500ml gel captures the delicious scent of freshly baked cinnamon buns, creating a sweet and cozy aroma that uplifts your senses. Its gentle, moisturizing formula cleanses without drying, leaving skin feeling smooth and refreshed. Paired with a soft white washcloth, this set adds a touch of spa luxury to your self-care time-perfect for everyday pampering or as a thoughtful gift. Suitable for all skin types and made with vegan and cruelty-free ingredients, this Treaclemoon bath set delivers warmth, comfort, and care in every use. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.
